modelJobs.description: This job runs all model jobs in the system.

atomicAttributes.description: Indicates if the contract is an annex
atomicAttributes.documentation: Flag to determine whether this contract is an annex to another contract
atomicAttributes.label: Is Annex

atomicAttributes.documentation: The date when the annex becomes effective, null if not an annex
atomicAttributes.label: Annex Start Date

atomicAttributes.documentation: External numeric identifier for the contract from source system
atomicAttributes.label: Contract ID Number

atomicAttributes.documentation: Currency used for the contract transactions (e.g., PLN, USD, EUR)
atomicAttributes.label: Currency

atomicAttributes.documentation: Descriptive name or title of the contract, typically includes customer name
atomicAttributes.label: Contract Name

atomicAttributes.documentation: The date when the contract becomes effective and valid
atomicAttributes.label: Start Date

atomicAttributes.documentation: The date when the contract expires or terminates
atomicAttributes.label: End Date

atomicAttributes.documentation: The date when the contract was sent to the customer for review or signature
atomicAttributes.label: Send Date

atomicAttributes.documentation: Depot or sales office responsible for managing this contract
atomicAttributes.label: Sales Depot

atomicAttributes.documentation: How often the customer is billed for services (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly, Annual)
atomicAttributes.label: Billing Frequency

atomicAttributes.documentation: Payment terms agreed with the customer, typically specifies number of days (e.g., 30 days, Net 60)
atomicAttributes.label: Payment Terms

atomicAttributes.documentation: Indicates if products have a flat fee pricing structure instead of variable pricing
atomicAttributes.label: Flat Fee Products

atomicAttributes.documentation: Indicates if optional services have a flat fee pricing structure instead of variable pricing
atomicAttributes.label: Flat Fee Options

atomicAttributes.documentation: Indicates if the contract supports multi-parcel shipments or bundled shipments
atomicAttributes.label: Multi Parcel

atomicAttributes.documentation: Account identifier in SAP ERP system for financial integration
atomicAttributes.label: SAP Account ID

atomicAttributes.documentation: The date when the contract was last electronically signed by authorized parties
atomicAttributes.label: Last E-signature Date

atomicAttributes.documentation: Indicates if the contract requires rerating quote or price recalculation
atomicAttributes.label: Rerating Quote

atomicAttributes.documentation: Customer number used internally by the system
atomicAttributes.label: Customer Number

atomicAttributes.documentation: Internal system identifier for the customer
atomicAttributes.label: Internal ID

atomicAttributes.documentation: Full legal or business name of the customer
atomicAttributes.label: Customer Name

atomicAttributes.documentation: Street address of the customer location
atomicAttributes.label: Address

atomicAttributes.documentation: House or building number of the customer address
atomicAttributes.label: House Number

atomicAttributes.documentation: Postal or ZIP code of the customer address
atomicAttributes.label: Postal Code

atomicAttributes.documentation: City or municipality of the customer address
atomicAttributes.label: City

atomicAttributes.documentation: ISO country code of the customer (e.g., PL, US, DE)
atomicAttributes.label: Country

atomicAttributes.documentation: Marketing agreement or consent status for the customer
atomicAttributes.label: Marketing Agreement
